artifact_imagenet: ImageNet is a large-scale image dataset for visual recognition, originally compiled by Fei-Fei Li's group at Stanford/Princeton. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_common_crawl: Common Crawl is a large-scale web crawl dataset used for pretraining language models. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_the_pile: The Pile is an open-source 800GB diverse text dataset for language model pretraining from EleutherAI. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_redpajama: RedPajama is an open-source replication of the LLaMA training dataset. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_fineweb: FineWeb is a large-scale curated web text dataset from Hugging Face. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_c4: C4 is the Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus dataset used for T5 pretraining. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_laion_5b: LAION-5B is a large-scale image-text pair dataset. Datasets are foundational research artifacts with documented compilers (e.g., ImageNet by Fei-Fei Li's group). Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
artifact_openwebtext: OpenWebText is an open-source web text dataset that approximates the GPT-2 training data. Their LLM recognition reflects how often the dataset name appears in training-corpus documents.
